prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: ASR-GOLDMESHPANNINGMATERIALS-4-FBA
Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING
Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor
Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Gold Panning 1/8 Classifier Screen Sifting Pan Prospecting Mesh Sieve
Description: The ASR Outdoor Large 13 Inch Stackable Classifier Screens remain an essential tool to include with your gold prospecting equipment, in order to greatly increase your gold recovery efforts and help you work smarter, not harder.
</br></br>
Utilizing our stainless steel wire classifier screens is one of the most important steps in successful gold recovery, by reducing down paydirt down to a manageable size for gold panning, sluicing or other, while removing unwanted organic material like rocks, gravels and sands and focus on getting to the gold.
</br></br>
These sifting classifier screens are made of tough, high impact polypropylene plastic and 304 stainless steel wire mesh, sure to see you through many gold prospecting seasons to come. Each soil sifter will fit a standard five gallon bucket, are designed to be stacked and used in multiple mesh sizes to create a classification funnel.
</br></br>
In short, gold is heavy, meaning it will sink to the bottom of a gold pan; but, if a gold pan is full of oversized rocks, it messes with that natural settling process. Classifying via sifting screens lets you focus on materials where gold nuggets, flakes or flour will actually show up, improving your chances of catching it. When you classify by size, you can run each size group through your gold panning or sluicing system separately. That gives you better control and increases the odds of recovering fine gold that might get lost in a rough mix.
</br></br>
And, if you're using a sluice, high banker, or other complex gold prospecting equipment, feeding oversized material into it can cause clogs, reduce efficiency, or even damage it. Here, classifiers act like a first line of defense.
</br></br>
Available in nine different sizes (see table below), for both fine and coarse material classification, the sifting screens or soil sifters will ensure you'll be able to properly classify a wide range of different sized raw material, no matter where you’re prospecting. Good luck!
Search Terms: gold panning sluice box prospecting sediment sorting geology classifier screen for home garden worm compost sifter mineral pay dirt collection outdoor dry sifting hash extractor micron sieve pollen soil herb THCL press fine material
Features:
- 5 GALLON BUCKET CLASSIFIER SCREEN: Soil sifting mesh classifiers will fit on top of 5 gallon bucket and our 14" gold pan; Interlocking, stackable design; Top Diameter: 13.25", Bottom Diameter: 11"
- RUGGED WEATHERPROOF DESIGN: Constructed from high-impact durable ABS plastic with 304 stainless steel wire mesh; will not rust or corrode under normal wear
- CLASSIFIER SIFTING SCREEN SIZE: 1/8" - 64 Holes per Inch
- GOLD PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT: Classifying your raw material down is imperative for successful gold recovery; sifting out large rocks and soil from your high-yielding pay dirt before working it through your gold pan or sluice box
- MULTIPURPOSE SIFTING PAN SCREENS: Ideal for many different purposes and a wide range of materials; nothing is off limits with these classifier sifting screens

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 13in Gold Panning Classifier Screen Sifter

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 1/8 In Gold Panning Classifier Screen Sieve

anthropic.title_differentiation: 18 Inch Mesh, Stackable Design, Stainless Steel Wire, Fits 5 Gallon Bucket, Prospecting Equipment

openai.title_differentiation: 5 Gallon Bucket Fit, 304 Stainless Steel Mesh, High Impact ABS Frame, Stackable, Rust Resistant, 64 Holes Per Inch
